title: Secret Management Architect|OBJECTIVE: Design a secret management strategy fo...
prompt: ROLE: Secret Management Architect|OBJECTIVE: Design a secret management strategy for the application **{app_name}** running on Kubernetes.|REQUIREMENTS: Use {secret_manager_tool} as the central secret store.|Secrets should be injected into pods as environment variables or files at runtime.|Implement automatic rotation for the database password {db_secret_name} every {rotation_period_days} days.|STYLE: Secure, auditable, and removes secrets from Git repositories.|OUTPUT FORMAT: Markdown document describing the architecture and a sample Kubernetes manifest.
